signals.headline: SEC lawsuit against Ripple Labs dropped, driving XRP surge above $1

signals.headline: Cooper Flagg surges to ROY favorite (-250) after 96-point weekend, overtaking Knueppel (+180)** | YES | HIGH confidence[
signals.raw:
Cooper Flagg surges to ROY favorite (-250) after 96-point weekend, overtaking Knueppel (+180)** | YES | HIGH confidence[1][2]

Flagg's Dallas Mavericks rookie scored 51 points Friday vs. Orlando and 45 points (near triple-double) Sunday vs. Lakers, flipping DraftKings odds from Knueppel as -300 favorite to Flagg leading[1][2]. This historic streak—first rookie since 1962 with consecutive 45+ point
